data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-24T12:57 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
The user is the Deacon agent starting up. I need to follow the startup protocol:

1. Run `gt deacon heartbeat` 
2. Check `gt hook`
3. If hook has work → execute it
4. If hook empty → create patrol wisp and execute

Let me start by running the heartbeat and checking the hook in parallel.

content.text:
```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ⛪ DEACON STARTING
  Gas Town patrol executor initializing...
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

Deacon, checking in. Running heartbeat and checking hook.

input.description: Check deacon hook for attached work

content.content:
🪝 Hook Status: deacon/
Role: deacon

Nothing on hook - no work slung

Next: Check inbox for work assignments: gt mail inbox

toolUseResult.stdout:
🪝 Hook Status: deacon/
Role: deacon

Nothing on hook - no work slung

Next: Check inbox for work assignments: gt mail inbox

content.thinking: Hook is empty. Per protocol: Hook empty → Check mail → If nothing, create patrol wisp. Let me check mail first.

content.text: Hook empty. Checking mail for assignments.

content.thinking:
No mail either. Per protocol: create patrol wisp and execute it.

The startup hook said it already created a patrol wisp: `skogtown-wisp-a5afg`. Let me check if that exists and has steps.

content.text: No mail. The startup hook created patrol wisp `skogtown-wisp-a5afg`. Let me check the current step.

content.content:
No molecules in progress for deacon.

To start work on a molecule:
  bd mol pour <proto-id>      # Instantiate a molecule from template
  bd update <step-id> --status in_progress  # Claim a step

toolUseResult.stdout:
No molecules in progress for deacon.

To start work on a molecule:
  bd mol pour <proto-id>      # Instantiate a molecule from template
  bd update <step-id> --status in_progress  # Claim a step

content.thinking: The wisp was created but isn't showing as a molecule in progress. Let me check if the wisp exists and try to hook it or create a new patrol.

content.text: Wisp not tracked as active molecule. Let me create a fresh patrol.

content: IDLE_CHECK: No active work on hook. If idle, start patrol: gt deacon patrol
